creator: fjoe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Eugene, if the problem is still actual for you, this is how you can get the chipset:

--- cut here ---
$ sudo dmidecode -s baseboard-product-name
Standard PC (Q35 + ICH9, 2009)
$
--- cut here ---

On i440fx the output is:

--- cut here ---
$ sudo dmidecode -s baseboard-product-name
Standard PC (i440FX + PIIX, 1996)
$ 
--- cut here ---
